title: 1.1: Tests that screen duplicates last drawn character specified number of times when REP control sequence is sent.
1.2: Tests that screen renders combined character with cursor advancement of 2 when emoji with skin tone modifier is drawn.
1.3: Tests that screen renders single flag symbol combined by character pairs with display width of 2 when regional indicator pair is drawn.
2.1: Places the test for REP control sequence in kitty_tests/screen.py.
2.2: Places the test for emoji skin tone modifier in kitty_tests/screen.py.
2.3: Places the test for regional indicators in kitty_tests/screen.py.
2.4: Places the test for test for zero-width joiners (ZWJ) in kitty_tests/screen.py.
3.1: All tests use self.ae() assertion method inherited from BaseTest class for assertion.
3.2:  All tests follow the test naming pattern test_<functionality>.
